title: Global Esports expands coaching booth with Aimix Strange, Fields
description: Platoon recruits some help in the GE coaching booth, adding two former Tier 2 head coaches.

description: Leviatán and 100 Thieves continue their ripe hot form after their respective international successes.

title: New-look Gen.G, VARREL rise after first week of Pacific Stage 2

title: Envy makes nightz official

title: Iceman returns: Marved to stand in for Sentinels
